name: generate_mesh
description: Generates a textured mesh from a prompt using AI.

maxTriangles.description: The maximum number of triangles for the generated mesh. If provided, this must be between 12 and 20000 (inclusive).

partNames.description: List of part names defining the schema for the generated mesh. Accepts a comma-separated string (e.g. 'body, left wheel, right wheel') or a JSON array of strings. When provided, a SchemaDefinition is used instead of the default PredefinedSchema.

size.description: The generation's bounding box size. The generation will try to fit within this volume. Try to approximate a good size based on textPrompt.

textPrompt.description: The text prompt describing the mesh to generate.
